arts.ttl: ‘Specifically Aston Villa’ – Emery has his eye on new striker, deal seen as good for everyone
arts.sum: Aston Villa are eyeing a move for Porto striker Samu Omorodion as they seek out a replacement for Jhon Duran. That’s according to AS, who report that the striker is back on Aston Villa’s list after being linked with a move in the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Unai Emery drops Marcus Rashford hint ahead of Liverpool game
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's Aston Villa could ignite against Premier League leaders Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery told me he hates me - but this is the truth behind our Aston Villa relationship - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery is especially demanding of his captain John McGinn John McGinn has hailed Unai Emery’s impact on his career and admits he has a love-hate relationship with the Aston Villa manager.

arts.ttl: Premier League scouts lining up for player after Aston Villa rejection works wonders
arts.sum: Aston Villa were heavily linked with a move for Juventus’ Weston McKennie in the summer transfer window. The USA international, who has played in a host of positions this season for the Italian giants, ended up rejecting Aston Villa and was soon reintegrated into the project at Juventus. arts.ttl: John McGinn voices Aston Villa group chat fear after adding Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: McGinn, appointed captain by Steven Gerrard in the summer of 2022, has ownership of the group chat which involves the whole squad and he has been delighted by the sort of player which the club have managed to lure - aided, of course, by the offer of Champions League football - which will hopefully give the thumbs up to others thinking of Villa as a viable destination. John McGinn has lauded the calibre of player which Aston Villa have attracted to the club this past January transfer window - but he is wary that the squad is getting such an upgrade he may end up having to leave the group chat he himself oversees as the club's captain!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have 'two transfer budgets' for the summer as NSWE in £550m PSR battle at Premier League HQ
Exclusive: £37m player has told Liverpool he wants to sign a new contract at Anfield urgently
arts.sum: Luis Diaz’s camp have informed Liverpool that they want his new contact sorting as a priority, however, TBR Football understands the club won’t be rushed...

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane explains why it is 'positive' Marcus Rashford has left Man United - before revealing what surprised him about his Aston Villa move
arts.sum: Rashford will spend the rest of the season at Villa Park after being frozen out by United head coach Ruben Amorim and his long-term future at his boyhood club remains uncertain.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury, suspension news and return dates vs. Aston Villa: Benoit Badiashile, Noni Madueke latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Chelsea's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League fixture against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson given Liverpool future timeline as Scotland skipper told he needs to make major change to his game
arts.sum: Injuries and some shaky showings have left Reds fans wondering if they need a new left back, but a former striker doesn't think so
